data.content: Implemented managed-skills doctor destination fallback so kno doctor reports missing managed skills even when the preferred root does not exist yet, and kno doctor --fix now installs them into the preferred location. Added unit and CLI regression coverage for missing-root doctor/fix flows and location resolution edge cases. Validation: make sanity passed in /Users/cartine/knots-18e9-doctor-skills-fix at 95.01% coverage. Branch: knots-18e9-doctor-skills-fix. Commit: 0678619e9b75. PR: #32.
